text: Step 5. This is the middle chamber. The chamber thickness is 10 micrometers and the window
size is 1 by 1 centimeter. This chamber is used to hold the solid electrolytes. The solid
electrolytes are strong acid cation exchange resin beads with a particle size of 600 to
800 micrometers. The resin beads are filled to fully occupy the middle chamber. In this
reactor, we will use the air-water to increase the ionic conductivity of the solid electrolytes
inside the middle chamber. This is the air-water inlet and this is the air-water outlet. Step
